preview_text:
The model favours Ivory Coast at 64%, with Curaçao assigned an 12% chance of victory and a 25% draw probability. Ivory Coast enters as the clear favourite, but the model credits Curaçao with non-trivial winning odds—roughly one in eight—suggesting competitive potential despite the gap.

The spread across outcomes shows Ivory Coast ahead but with meaningful room for alternatives. A draw rates as the second-most-likely scenario at nearly one quarter, indicating the match could remain level through regular time. The 52 percentage-point gap between the favourite and underdog reflects asymmetry, yet the model's assignment of significant draw probability implies neither team is expected to dominate territorially.

The sportsbook consensus is substantially more bullish on Ivory Coast, rating them at 81% versus the model's 64%—a divergence of 17 percentage points. Books assign Curaçao only 6% and draws 13%, both well below the model's estimates. Polymarket prices align closely with the sportsbooks. This dashboard presents both views without claiming which reflects true match likelihood.
